title: Daniel Dae Kim Make Korean Culture Global in Docuseries
title_cn: Daniel Dae Kim 通过系列纪录片让韩国文化走向世界
summary: Actor, director and producer Daniel Dae Kim joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss "K-Everything" his new docuseries that explores the explosion of Korean culture on the global scene. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why New Zealanders Are Moving To Australia in Record Numbers
title_cn: 为什么新西兰人移居澳大利亚的人数创历史新高
summary: About 41,000 New Zealanders moved to Australia in 2025, the most in 12 years, drawn by a more robust jobs market. When even former Prime Minister Jacinda Ardern left, it made international headlines. Net citizen migration is at its lowest since records began, and unlike in past waves, people aren't coming home. Former PM John Key, Cambridge Provost Gillian Tett, and a young lawyer who says he doubled his salary by leaving explain what's gone wrong and what it would take to reverse it. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Awaits Iranian Response After Hormuz Clashes Strain Ceasefire
title_cn: 霍尔木兹冲突紧张停火后美国等待伊朗回应
summary:
The US was waiting on Iran’s response to its latest proposal to end the war after suggesting word could come imminently, following clashes in the Strait of Hormuz that strained a month-long ceasefire. Bloomberg News Deputy UAE Bureau Chief Abeer Abu Omar and White House Correspondent Jeff Mason join David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss.

Iran has still given no indication whether it will accept President Donald Trump’s plan, sent on Wednesday, which proposes that the Islamic Republic reopen the waterway and the US end a blockade on Iranian ports over the next month.

Tehran’s response is “under review,” Foreign Ministry Spokesman Esmail Baghaei told the semi-official Tasnim news agency, without giving a timeline.

Trump told reporters at the White House late Friday he was still expecting a response “tonight.” Asked if Iran was intentionally slow-rolling the process, he said “we’ll find out soon enough.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran War Is Draining World’s Oil Buffer at an Unprecedented Pace
title_cn: 伊朗战争正在以前所未有的速度耗尽世界石油缓冲
summary: The world has burned through oil inventories at a record speed as the Iran war throttles flows from the Persian Gulf, eating into the very buffer that protects against supply shocks.

title: China Vows to Advance Efforts to Defuse Local Government Debt
title_cn: 中国誓言进一步努力化解地方政府债务
summary: China pledged to step up efforts to defuse local government debt risk while supporting growth, as the State Council called for stronger policy execution in a challenging global environment.

title: ‘It’s Not Because They Want to Be Friends’: Brilliant on What to Expect From the Trump-Xi Summit
title_cn: “这不是因为他们想成为朋友”：对特习峰会的期待非常精彩
summary: The postponed Beijing summit between President Trump and China’s President Xi is back on the agenda, delayed by a war in Iran that has reshaped the dynamic between the two leaders. After a tumultuous 2025 that saw tariff escalation and revealed critical mineral choke points, both sides are looking for stability, not a breakthrough. Myron Brilliant, who recently returned from Beijing, says China thinks it's cracked the code on Trump. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK Moves Warship to Middle East for Potential Hormuz Mission
title_cn: 英国将军舰移至中东执行潜在的霍尔木兹任务
summary: The UK will deploy one of its warships to the Middle East as part of planning for a European-led mission to escort ships through the Strait of Hormuz once there’s a stable ceasefire.

title: Moving people and money across borders
title_cn: 跨境转移人员和资金
summary: What happens when intellectual capital flows across borders?

title: Crypto Industry Throws Lap-Dance Party in Middle of Bear Market
title_cn: 加密行业在熊市中举办脱衣舞派对
summary: People lined up for blocks and waited for hours to get into the E11even club in Miami on Wednesday night, with several men talking excitedly about the lap dances they planned to get inside.

title: Lagarde Says ECB Torn Between Risk of Acting Too Early, Too Late
title_cn: 拉加德称欧洲央行面临行动过早和过晚的风险
summary: The European Central Bank is carefully weighing its response to the Iran war and the impact on inflation to ensure it acts neither prematurely nor too late, President Christine Lagarde told Spain’s RTVE.

title: Goldman Sees Fed Cuts Delayed to December, March on Inflation
title_cn: 高盛预计美联储因通胀降息将推迟至12月、3月
summary: Goldman Sachs said it pushed back expectations for the US Federal Reserve’s next two rate cuts by one quarter to December 2026 and March 2027 as inflation proves stickier than anticipated.

title: Air India to Cut Costs, Reduce Flights as War Worsens Financial Struggles
title_cn: 印度航空因战争加剧财务困境而削减成本、减少航班
summary: Air India Ltd. is looking to implement steps to cut costs and reduce flights in the wake of the Iran war, people familiar with the matter said, just as the unprofitable airline searches for a new leader to navigate an exceptionally difficult period.

title: Iran War Drives Africa’s Fertilizer Crisis
title_cn: 伊朗战争引发非洲化肥危机
summary: Africa’s farmland could be worth $1 trillion, but global shocks are raising the stakes. Fertilizer shortages, rising costs and supply disruptions are putting pressure on food production across the continent. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China’s Energy Imports Plunge as War Chokes Hormuz Shipments
title_cn: 由于战争阻碍霍尔木兹运输，中国能源进口大幅下降
summary: Chinese energy imports fell sharply in April, as the near-halt to shipments through the Strait of Hormuz choked a vital channel for crude oil and natural gas.

title: China Gold Output Falls as Investor Demand for Bars, Coins Jumps
title_cn: 随着投资者对金条和金币的需求激增，中国黄金产量下降
summary: China’s gold output declined in the first quarter of 2026, weighed down by safety inspections and production suspensions, according to data from the China Gold Association.

title: Colombia Inflation Ticks Up, Fueling Case For Renewed Rate Hikes
title_cn: 哥伦比亚通胀上升，加剧了再次加息的理由
summary: Colombian inflation sped up in April, moving further away from the central bank’s target and raising the likelihood it may need to resume interest rate hikes after an unexpected pause late last month.

title: Wall Street Week | High Stakes Summit, New Zealand's Brain Drain, Stablecoin Adoption, Bubbly Water
title_cn: 华尔街周刊 |高风险峰会、新西兰人才流失、稳定币采用、气泡水
summary: This week, China thinks it's cracked the code on Trump heading into a summit in Beijing. And, what happens when a country's best and brightest travel overseas and stop coming back? Plus, the most useful thing about crypto might be the one nobody's talking about: cheap and fast cross-border payments. Later, the smartest bet in the sparkling water boom might not be on any brand, but on the companies behind them. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Florida, Louisiana-Focused Insurer Safepoint Files for IPO
title_cn: 专注于佛罗里达州和路易斯安那州的保险公司 Safepoint 申请首次公开募股
summary: Safepoint Holdings Inc., an underwriter of specialty homeowners and commercial insurance, filed for an initial public offering, disclosing growing profit and revenue.

title: Pakistan to Receive $1.32 Billion as IMF Board Approves Tranches
title_cn: 国际货币基金组织理事会批准部分资金 巴基斯坦将获得 13.2 亿美元
summary: Pakistan will receive about $1.32 billion after the International Monetary Fund Board approved loan tranches under existing facilities, boosting the country’s ability to shield its economy from increased global risks.

title: Honeywell-Backed Computing Firm Quantinuum Files for US IPO
title_cn: 霍尼韦尔支持的计算公司 Quantinuum 申请美国首次公开募股
summary: Quantinuum Inc., a quantum computing company backed by Honeywell International Inc., filed for a US initial public offering, capitalizing on enthusiasm around quantum computing stocks.

title: Winning the Degenerate Economy: Masters in Business with Howard Lindzon
title_cn: 赢得衰退的经济：霍华德·林宗 (Howard Lindzon) 的商业硕士
summary: Barry speaks with Howard Lindzon, co-founder and CEO of StockTwits, and founder and managing partner at Social Leverage. They discuss his outlook for venture capital investing including what he sees as potentially profitable from human behavior. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BlackRock Readies Launch of Two Tokenized Money-Market Funds
title_cn: 贝莱德准备推出两只代币化货币市场基金
summary: BlackRock Inc. is planning to launch two money-market funds built for investors who hold their cash in stablecoins, not bank accounts, a sign the world’s largest asset manager sees a durable customer base in the digital-dollar economy.

title: Private Equity Taps Junk Market for Dividends as Exits Stall
title_cn: 私募股权退出垃圾股市场以获取股息
summary: Private equity firms are once again tapping the European junk debt market to pay themselves dividends as market volatility fueled by the Iran war and AI anxiety limits their ability to cash out.

title: Fed Sees Private Credit Redemptions as ‘Manageable’ Risks
title_cn: 美联储认为私人信贷赎回风险“可控”
summary: The Federal Reserve said stability risks from further private credit redemption requests appear “limited and manageable,” after some of the biggest names in the market blocked investors from getting money out of their funds in recent months.

title: Shaquille O'Neal on Partnership with Authentic Brands
title_cn: 沙奎尔·奥尼尔谈与正宗品牌的合作
summary: NBA Hall of Famer Shaquille O'Neal & Authentic Brands CEO Jamie Salter discuss the launch of 'Dunkman,' a new dunk league aiming to compete with the NBA dunk contest. They talk with Romaine Bostick at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: S&P Closes Out 6th Straight Week of Gains | Closing Bell
title_cn: 标准普尔连续第六周上涨结束钟声
summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Scarlet Fu, Isabelle Lee, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title_cn: 通过 SPAC 上市后，Enhanced Games 所有者股价飙升 21%
summary: Enhanced Group Inc. shares climbed almost 21% after going public via a merger with blank-check company A Paradise Acquisition Corp.

title: Fannie, Freddie’s Latest Bull Says Traders Underpricing IPO Odds
title_cn: 房利美和房地美最新牛市称交易员低估了 IPO 赔率
summary: Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac investors are underestimating the chances of a public market re-entry from the mortgage giants after a lull in chatter around the names, according to Mizuho’s Dan Dolev.

title: Health Firms Odyssey, Mobia Fall After $454 Million IPO Haul
title_cn: 医疗保健公司 Odyssey 和 Mobia 在 4.54 亿美元的 IPO 后纷纷倒闭
summary: A pair of healthcare companies ended their trading debuts lower after raising a combined $454 million in their initial public offerings.

title: ECB’s Escrivá Says AI Risks Prompt Finance Infrastructure Review
title_cn: 欧洲央行 Escrivá 表示人工智能风险促使金融基础设施审查
summary: Central banks must review the resilience of financial infrastructure given the rise of artificial intelligence, as well as defend their role as the ultimate guarantor against risks posed by stablecoins, said European Central Bank Governing Council member José Luis Escrivá.

title: Kenya Plans Taxes on Phones, Banking Fees to Raise $1 Billion
title_cn: 肯尼亚计划通过电话税和银行费用筹集 10 亿美元
summary: Kenya plans taxes on mobile phones and banking fees to help raise nearly $1 billion in revenue in an effort to trim the nation’s fiscal deficit to its lowest in a decade and tackle debt challenges.

title: Chinese Export Growth Rebounds as War Fails to Curb Trade
title_cn: 战争未能遏制贸易，中国出口增长反弹
summary: China’s export growth rebounded more than expected despite disruptions to shipping caused by the war in Iran, as trade volumes swell due to an investment boom in artificial intelligence.

title: ByteDance Targets 25% Rise in AI Infrastructure Spending: SCMP
title_cn: 字节跳动的目标是人工智能基础设施支出增长 25%：南华早报
summary: ByteDance Ltd. has boosted planned spending on artificial intelligence infrastructure this year by 25% to 200 billion yuan ($29.4 billion), as memory chip costs rise and the TikTok owner ramps up its AI presence, the South China Morning Post reported on Saturday.

title: US Said to Suspect Nvidia Chips Smuggled to Alibaba Via Thailand
title_cn: 美国怀疑英伟达芯片经泰国走私至阿里巴巴
summary: A key company behind Thailand’s national AI effort is suspected of helping to smuggle billions of dollars worth of Super Micro Computer Inc. servers containing advanced Nvidia Corp. chips to China, with Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. one of multiple end customers, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: China’s Top Economic Planner Urges Stronger Coordination on AI
title_cn: 中国最高经济规划师敦促加强人工智能协调
summary: China’s leading economic planning agency called for stronger coordination and top-level planning in artificial intelligence development.

title: Some College Finals Delayed After Canvas Online Platform Hacked
title_cn: Canvas 在线平台被黑后，一些大学期末考试被推迟
summary: Disruptions for college students are set to drag into the weekend after hackers briefly took down an online platform used by thousands of schools around the world, from Princeton University in the US to the University of Manchester in the UK and the Universidad del Desarrollo in Chile.

title: Intel CEO Who Won Over Trump and Musk Now Needs a Breakthrough
title_cn: 赢得特朗普和马斯克支持的英特尔首席执行官现在需要突破
summary: After Lip-Bu Tan became chief executive officer of Intel Corp. in March of last year, the struggling company’s shares went nowhere for seven months while the chipmaker was getting trounced in the market for artificial intelligence.

title: Judge to Review Musk, SEC Settlement Deal in Twitter Stake Case
title_cn: 法官将审查马斯克与 SEC 在 Twitter 股权案中的和解协议
summary: A federal judge is asking for more information about a proposed settlement between Elon Musk and the US Securities and Exchange Commission, after the billionaire agreed to pay $1.5 million to end a lawsuit alleging he waited too long to disclose his growing stake in Twitter.

title: Chip Stock Surge Sends Markets to Record Highs | The Close 5/8/2026
title_cn: 芯片库存飙升推动市场创历史新高收盘价 2026 年 5 月 8 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Kestra Investment Management CIO Kara Murphy, Precision Neuroscience CEO Michael Mager, Carlyle’s Jason Thomas, Fmr. National Economic Council Dir. Gene Sperling, Envestnet’s Dana D’Auria, DraftKings CEO Jason Robins, NBA Hall of Famer Shaquille O’Neal & Authentic Brands CEO Jamie Salter, Toms Founder Blake Mycoskie, Milk Bar CEO Christina Tosi & Jade Leaf Matcha GM Daniel Woldar, & gamma. CEO Larry Jackson. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Yahoo Pays Up to Refinance $1.6 Billion of Buyout-Tied Debt
title_cn: 雅虎支付高达 16 亿美元的收购相关债务再融资费用
summary: Yahoo Inc. raised $1.6 billion from a loan and bond deal to refinance debt tied to its acquisition by Apollo Global Management after offering investors one of the highest-yielding deals of the year.

title: Nvidia Names Goldman Sachs Veteran Suzanne Nora Johnson to Board
title_cn: Nvidia 任命高盛资深人士 Suzanne Nora Johnson 为董事会成员
summary: Nvidia Corp. named former Goldman Sachs Group Inc. Vice Chairman Suzanne Nora Johnson as a director, adding a finance-industry and philanthropy veteran to the chipmaker’s board.

title: Carlyle Global Research Head on AI's Economic Impact
title_cn: 凯雷人工智能经济影响全球研究主管
summary: Carlyle Head of Global Research & Investment Strategy Jason Thomas discusses expectations of enormous AI productivity gains moving forward, and why US valuations are much more attractive now. He talks with Romaine Bostick at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Burry Buys MercadoLibre After Slump, Eyes 15% Returns
title_cn: Burry 在股市低迷后买入 MercadoLibre，希望获得 15% 的回报
summary: Michael Burry is buying shares of MercadoLibre Inc. after a slump in the Latin American e-commerce and fintech company’s stock.

title: Momentum Trade at New Extremes Is Drawing Wall Street Warnings
title_cn: 新极端的贸易势头正在引起华尔街的警告
summary: The momentum trade — buy what’s winning, sell what isn’t — was already running red-hot heading into this week. Now a pause in the Iran war, strong US jobs data and another sharp rally in AI chips just piled on more fuel.

title: US Stocks Set Record High as Chip Stocks Roar, Payrolls Beat
title_cn: 芯片股飙升、就业数据强劲，美国股市创下历史新高
summary: US stocks closed at a record high for the third time this week, buoyed by semiconductor stocks, solid employment data and a US-Iran ceasefire that appeared intact even with clashes near the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Anthropic Inks $1.8 Billion Computing Deal With Akamai
title_cn: Anthropic 与 Akamai 签署价值 18 亿美元的计算交易
summary: Anthropic PBC has signed a $1.8 billion computing deal with cloud services provider Akamai Technologies Inc. to meet surging demand for its artificial intelligence software, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Musk, Altman Management Styles Under Fire at OpenAI Trial
title_cn: 马斯克、奥特曼的管理风格在 OpenAI 审判中受到批评
summary: Elon Musk and Sam Altman both took a beating over their leadership styles in court testimony this week as a jury waded further into their OpenAI feud.

title: AI Chipmaker Cerebras Is Said to Plan Raising IPO Price Range
title_cn: 据称人工智能芯片制造商 Cerebras 计划提高 IPO 价格区间
summary: Cerebras Systems Inc. is set to increase the price range of its initial public offering as soon as Monday, according to people familiar with the matter, as demand for the artificial intelligence chipmaker’s shares continues to build.

title: QVC Shareholders Claim Firm Giving Away Their Value to Creditors
title_cn: QVC 股东声称公司将其价值拱手让给债权人
summary: Shareholders of bankrupt television shopping network QVC have accused the company of wrongly trying to give away hundreds of millions dollars worth of assets to other stakeholders as part of a proposal to cut debt and end the company’s insolvency case.

title: Google’s Isomorphic Labs to Raise Over $2 Billion in New Funding
title_cn: 谷歌同构实验室将筹集超过 20 亿美元的新资金
summary: Isomorphic Labs, an AI-powered drug discovery company spun out of Alphabet Inc.’s Google DeepMind, is in advanced discussions to raise more than $2 billion in a new round of funding, according to people familiar with the plan.

title: CoreWeave Shares Drop After Forecast Sparks Growth Fears | Bloomberg Tech 5/8/2026
title_cn: 预测引发增长担忧后 CoreWeave 股价下跌彭博科技 2026 年 5 月 8 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde sits down with CoreWeave CEO Michael Intrator to discuss the company's earnings as it builds out data center capacity. Plus, a deep dive into April's jobs report and the impact of AI on today's workforce with Clara Shih from the New Work Foundation. And, more earnings with Lyft CEO David Risher as the company spends on international expansion. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Wants to Make H-1B Workers More Expensive for US Employers
title_cn: 特朗普希望让 H-1B 工人对美国雇主来说更加昂贵
summary: An entry‑level software engineer in San Francisco would need to be paid $162,000 a year to qualify for an H‑1B visa under a Trump administration proposal — almost 30% more than today. In Dallas, the minimum would jump by a similar rate to $113,000 and in New York to $132,000.

title: Why the 'SpaceMob' Is So Bullish on AST
title_cn: 为什么“SpaceMob”如此看好 AST
summary: AST SpaceMobile, a rival to SpaceX, has a huge online community that is helping drive the stock price higher. Bloomberg's Sana Pashankar reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Impact of AI on Hiring, Workforce Trends
title_cn: 人工智能对招聘、劳动力趋势的影响
summary: Learning AI is becoming more and more crucial for workers to get hired, as 42% of recent grads are still underemployed. Clara Shih, founder and CEO of the New Work Foundation and former Head of Business at Meta, says she wants AI to be profitable not just for businesses, but for everyone - including the millions of 25-year-olds currently unemployed. She joins Caroline Hyde on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NYC School District Hit by Malware Attack as Well as Canvas Hack
title_cn: 纽约学区遭受恶意软件攻击和 Canvas 黑客攻击
summary: As the New York City Public School system grapples with the Canvas service hack affecting schools nationwide, one of its Manhattan campuses is contending with a separate incident.

title: Thiel-Backed Olympics Competitor Goes Public
title_cn: 蒂尔支持的奥运会竞争对手上市
summary: An Olympics-style sports event that welcomes performance-enhancing drugs is set for later this month in Las Vegas. The company behind that endeavor just went public in a merger with a blank-check company, a SPAC deal that valued it at $1.2 billion with backing from Peter Thiel and former Coinbase CTO Balaji Srinivasan. Enhanced CEO Maximilian Martin joins Caroline Hyde from the floor of the New York Stock Exchange on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: gamma. CEO Larry Jackson on Music Career, Ye's Comeback
title_cn: 伽玛。首席执行官拉里·杰克逊谈音乐事业和叶的回归
summary: gamma. CEO & Co-Founder Larry Jackson discusses his career in the music industry, his relationship with Kanye West, and how artificial intelligence has changed the business. He talks with Romaine Bostick at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: MercadoLibre Dives As Profits Miss on Rapid Growth Push
title_cn: MercadoLibre 因快速增长推动利润下滑而跳水
summary: Shares in e-commerce and fintech giant MercadoLibre Inc. slipped after profits missed estimates for the fourth quarter in a row even as revenue grew at its fastest pace in nearly four years.

title: Senegal MPs Pass Electoral Reform, Clearing Sonko Presidency Bid
title_cn: 塞内加尔议员通过选举改革，清除桑科总统竞选
summary: Senegalese lawmakers voted for an electoral code amendment that is widely seen as clearing the way for Prime Minister Ousmane Sonko to run in the next presidential election.

title: Hungary’s New PM Magyar Demands President Quit in Showdown
title_cn: 匈牙利新总理马扎尔在摊牌中要求总统辞职
summary: Hungary’s newly installed prime minister Peter Magyar called on the president to quit in a confrontation in parliament that sought to draw the line on 16 years of increasingly autocratic rule by Viktor Orban.

title: Japan Considers Sending Officials to Russia as Soon as End-May
title_cn: 日本考虑最快5月底向俄罗斯派遣官员
summary: Japan may send government officials to Russia as early as the end of May to maintain communications with Moscow to support its companies that are still operating there, the trade ministry said in a post on X.

title: NATO Nations Brace for Trump to Pull More Troops from Europe
title_cn: 北约国家支持特朗普从欧洲撤出更多军队
summary: US allies in Europe anticipate that President Donald Trump will withdraw more forces from the continent after he announced he would pull 5,000 troops out of Germany, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Starmer Seeks to Reassert Position With Ex-PM Brown’s Return
title_cn: 斯塔默寻求在前总理布朗回归后重申立场
summary: Former prime minister Gordon Brown was appointed UK special envoy on global finance as part of Keir Starmer’s attempt to patch up the rival factions in his Labour Party after it suffered dismal local election results.

title: Magyar Takes Office Vowing to Return Hungary to European Fold
title_cn: 马扎尔上任誓言让匈牙利重返欧洲
summary: Peter Magyar assumed power as Hungary’s prime minister, officially ending Viktor Orban’s 16-year rule and pledging to reverse the nation’s autocratic slide and return it to the European mainstream.

title: China Calls On Germany to Stem EU Drift Toward Protectionism
title_cn: 中国呼吁德国阻止欧盟走向保护主义
summary: China called on Germany to play “a constructive role” in urging the European Union not to stray further toward protectionism.

title: US Awaits Iranian Response After Hormuz Clashes Strain Ceasefire
title_cn: 霍尔木兹冲突紧张停火后美国等待伊朗回应
summary: The US was waiting on Iran’s response to its latest proposal to end the war after suggesting word could come imminently, following clashes in the Strait of Hormuz that strained a month-long ceasefire.

title: Scotland’s Push for Independence Could Be Back in Play After Labour Flops
title_cn: 工党失败后，苏格兰争取独立的努力可能会重新开始
summary: Scotland’s push for another independence referendum could be back in play after nationalists emerged to dominate the country’s devolved parliament following an election that saw a collapse in support for Britain’s two traditional parties of power.

title: Trump’s Anger at Germany Hangs Over EU Trade Deal Push
title_cn: 特朗普对德国推动欧盟贸易协议的愤怒挥之不去
summary: Donald Trump’s rift with Friedrich Merz is complicating the European Union’s push to finish its US trade deal before fresh tariffs arrive.

title: Israel Tightens Grip on Gaza as Deadlock With Hamas Persists
title_cn: 以色列加强对加沙的控制，与哈马斯的僵局持续存在
summary: Israel has expanded its control of Gazan territory and is considering more intense military action, further squeezing the war-torn enclave.

title: Putin Holds Victory Day Parade After Trump Brokers Ukraine Truce
title_cn: 特朗普斡旋乌克兰停战后普京举行胜利日阅兵
summary: Russian President Vladimir Putin held a relatively low-key military parade Saturday to mark the World War II victory over Nazi Germany, after US President Donald Trump brokered a three-day ceasefire with Ukraine.

title: Denmark Liberal Leader Takes Over Coalition Talks After PM Fails
title_cn: 首相失败后丹麦自由党领袖接管联盟谈判
summary: Liberal leader Troels Lund Poulsen took over Denmark’s coalition-building talks, dealing a blow to caretaker Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen’s bid for a third term after more than six weeks of negotiations broke down.

title: Coup Against UK PM Complicated as Rivals Lose Votes on Home Turf
title_cn: 由于竞争对手在主场失去选票，针对英国首相的政变变得复杂
summary: Keir Starmer’s main leadership rivals went into Thursday’s local elections weighing a challenge against the prime minister. But Friday’s results showed some of them on increasingly shaky ground in their own constituencies, a factor complicating any potential coup.

title: Poland Says It’s Open to More US Troops If Moved From Germany
title_cn: 波兰表示愿意接受更多美军从德国撤军
summary: Warsaw is ready to take in more US soldiers, Poland’s defense minister said on Saturday, after US President Donald Trump indicated he may relocate troops from neighboring Germany.

title: China Urges France to Help Keep EU Markets Open Through Dialogue
title_cn: 中国敦促法国通过对话帮助保持欧盟市场开放
summary: China said it hopes France will play an active role in encouraging the European Union to keep its markets open as well as resolve economic and trade disputes through dialogue.

title: Starmer Rivals Plot Slow-Motion Takeover After Election Rout
title_cn: 斯塔默的竞争对手在选举溃败后密谋缓慢接管
summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer pulled through the immediate aftermath of bruising UK local elections, but his longer-term position remained in jeopardy as his Labour rivals touted a plan to replace him with Greater Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham.

title: Scotland’s Pro-Independence SNP Wins; Misses Out on Majority
title_cn: 苏格兰支持独立的苏格兰民族党获胜；错失多数
summary: The Scottish National Party secured a record fifth straight term in government but fell short of the majority that leader John Swinney said would have given him a mandate for a new referendum on Scotland leaving the UK.

title: India Names New Defense Chief as Military Overhaul Accelerates
title_cn: 印度任命新国防部长，军事改革加速
summary: India appointed retired general NS Raja Subramani as its next defense chief on Saturday as the country undertakes it biggest military reorganization in seven decades amid border tensions.

title: Iran Businesses Buckle Under Strain of Record Internet Shutdown
title_cn: 伊朗企业在创纪录的互联网关闭压力下不堪重负
summary: Iran’s record internet blackout is taking a heavy toll on private businesses, with owners and industry officials warning that it could lead to mass layoffs and closures.

title: US Sanctions Chinese Satellite Imagery Companies Over Iran War
title_cn: 美国因伊朗战争制裁中国卫星图像公司
summary: The US imposed sanctions on three Chinese firms for providing satellite imagery to Iran, enabling its military strikes on American forces in the Middle East, as Washington ramps up efforts to restrict technological support for Tehran in the conflict.

title: Vietnam Expands South China Sea Outposts as Beijing Widens Lead
title_cn: 随着北京扩大领先优势，越南扩大南海前哨基地
summary: Vietnam has expanded its outposts in the South China Sea by hundreds of acres over the past year, according to a new report, as Hanoi and Beijing race to reinforce competing territorial claims through land reclamation.

title: Philippines Ex-President Duterte Taps New Lawyer for ICC Trial
title_cn: 菲律宾前总统杜特尔特任命新律师参加国际刑事法院审判
summary: Former Philippine President Rodrigo Duterte hired a new lead counsel as he heads for a full-blown trial on alleged crimes against humanity charges before the International Criminal Court.

title: US Awaits Iranian Response as Clashes Raise Tensions | Balance of Power: Late Edition 05/08/2026
title_cn: 冲突加剧紧张局势，美国等待伊朗回应权力平衡：最新版 05/08/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, David Hale, former US Ambassador to Lebanon and Pakistan & current Wilson Center Distinguished Fellow, shares his insight on how receptive he feels Iran is towards US asks as amid renewed clashes in Hormuz. Rep. Jennifer McClellan (D-VA) voices her frustration with Virginia’s Supreme Court striking down the state’s new redistricting map. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Expects Iranian Response Soon Amid Clashes in Hormuz
title_cn: 美国期待伊朗在霍尔木兹冲突中尽快做出反应
summary: The US said it expects Iran to respond to its latest proposal to end their war imminently, as clashes in the Strait of Hormuz threatened to further fracture a month-long ceasefire.

title: Pressure is Mounting: Amb. Hale on US-Iran Relations
title_cn: 压力正在增加：Amb。黑尔谈美伊关系
summary: David Hale, former US Ambassador to Lebanon and Pakistan & current Wilson Center Distinguished Fellow, shares his insight on how receptive he feels Iran is towards US asks amid renewed clashes in Hormuz. He also talks about what to expect from the summit between President Trump and China’s Xi Jinping. David speaks with Kailey Leinz on the late edition of Bloomberg’s “Balance of Power. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Exploring All Options: Rep. McClellan on Virginia's Top Court Blocks New Congressional Map
title_cn: 探索所有选择：众议员麦克莱伦在弗吉尼亚州最高法院阻止新的国会地图
summary: Rep. Jennifer McClellan (D-VA) voices her frustration with Virginia’s Supreme Court striking down the state’s new redistricting map. She states political officials are “exploring all options” to turn this around, and emphasizes the need to mobilize and vote this November. She also talks about the US Supreme Court’s decision on the voting rights act and what the broader ramifications might be, along with whether or not she sees an end to the ongoing redistricting battle. Representative McClellan speaks with Kailey Leinz on the late edition of Bloomberg’s “Balance of Power.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Senegal’s Faye Repels Election Bill Seen Aiding Sonko’s 2029 Bid
title_cn: 塞内加尔的 Faye 否决了有助于 Sonko 2029 年竞选的选举法案
summary: Senegalese President Bassirou Diomaye Faye sent back to parliament for reconsideration a set of electoral law amendments that may clear the way for Prime Minister Ousmane Sonko to run in the 2029 presidential election.

title: Trump Plans to Fire FDA’s Makary After Tumult at Agency
title_cn: 在 FDA 发生骚乱后，特朗普计划解雇 FDA 的 Makary
summary: President Donald Trump plans to fire Food and Drug Administration Commissioner Marty Makary, following months of chaos at one of the country’s most important health agencies, according to a person familiar with the matter.
